decision_statement: Invest in strategic sensing and option-generation capabilities as a major ProductOS upgrade.
failure_causes: The system surfaces interesting signals but not enough decision-ready clarity to change PM behavior.
Weak-signal outputs create noise and reduce trust instead of improving foresight.
early_warning_indicators: PMs repeatedly ask for more evidence before acting on signal hypotheses.
Recommended options collapse into superficial variants rather than distinct strategic paths.
reversal_triggers: Signal-hypothesis outputs are frequently ignored over two review cycles.
Users report lower trust because recommendations feel speculative rather than grounded.
success_conditions: PMs use the new artifacts to shape discovery priorities before roadmap commitment.
Leadership reviews identify clearer options and fewer surprise objections.
